info.title: Model Context Protocol Discovery Tool
info.description:
Scans .NET assemblies for MCP (Model Context Protocol) metadata
and generates a structured JSON file with discovered capabilities.

options.name: --omit-path
options.description:
Omit base path from assembly paths in output
-n, --no-timestamp Omit timestamp from output (for version control)

arguments.name: OUTPUT_DIRECTORY
arguments.description: Directory where mcp-metadata.json will be written
